subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Insofar as thou art able, let the peerless Lord be made manifest and resplendent from the realm that transcendeth all measure and limitation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء تا تواناای خداوند بیمانند از جهان بیچون و چند ظاهر و آشکار گردد
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
